SEARCH
程序包 LoginPage

类 Applicant

java.lang.Object
LoginPage.Applicant
public class Applicant extends Object
Entity class representing a TA applicant in the recruitment system. An applicant applies for a specific module and goes through a workflow of statuses: Pending, Shortlisted, Approved, or Rejected.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Applicant(String applicantId, String name, String moduleName, String course, String englishLevel, String completedCourses, String cvFileName, String status)
    Constructs an Applicant with all fields.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Applicant

      public Applicant(String applicantId, String name, String moduleName, String course, String englishLevel, String completedCourses, String cvFileName, String status)
      Constructs an Applicant with all fields.
      参数:
      applicantId - unique applicant identifier (e.g. "A001")
      name - applicant's full name
      moduleName - the module applied for (e.g. "CS101")
      course - applicant's current course of study
      englishLevel - English proficiency level (e.g. "IELTS 7.0")
      completedCourses - semicolon-separated list of completed courses
      cvFileName - name of the uploaded CV file
      status - current application status

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Updates the application status.
      参数:
      status - new status (e.g. "Pending", "Shortlisted", "Approved", "Rejected")
